fields.label: Lease ID
fields.description: System-generated document identifier, such as LEASE-2026-00001.

fields.label: Lease Title
fields.description: Human-readable lease name used in list views and global search.

fields.label: Property
fields.description: Link the lease to the underlying property or site.

fields.label: Region
fields.description: Region copied from the linked Property record.

fields.label: Landlord
fields.description: The counterparty or owner associated with the lease.

fields.label: Lease Type
fields.description: Classifies the asset or occupancy type covered by the agreement.

fields.label: External / Contract Reference
fields.description: Optional external contract, system, or vendor reference.

fields.label: Predecessor Lease
fields.description: The previous lease record that this lease succeeds.

fields.label: Responsible Department
fields.description: Business team accountable for lease administration and renewals.

fields.label: Responsible Officer
fields.description: Primary user responsible for day-to-day lease tracking.

fields.label: Contract Owner
fields.description: User who owns the contract relationship and final accountability.

fields.label: Backup Officer
fields.description: Secondary user to cover administration when the primary owner is unavailable.

fields.label: Reminder Policy
fields.description: Reminder schedule and escalation rules applied to this lease.

fields.label: Lease Contacts
fields.description: Primary contacts on the landlord or tenant side for notices and follow-up.

fields.label: Start Date
fields.description: Date the lease term begins.

fields.label: End Date
fields.description: Date the lease term ends and renewal or exit planning starts.

fields.label: Notice Period (Days)
fields.description: Number of days of advance notice required before expiry or termination.

fields.label: Notice Deadline
fields.description: Calculated deadline for serving notice, based on end date and notice period.

fields.label: Renewal Option
fields.description: Specifies whether renewal is unavailable, optional, automatic, or negotiable.

fields.label: Renewal Option Deadline
fields.description: Deadline by which the renewal option must be exercised.

fields.label: Break Clause Date
fields.description: Earliest date the lease can be broken or terminated under the clause.

fields.label: Auto Renew
fields.description: Enable if the lease automatically renews unless notice is served.

fields.label: Days to Expiry
fields.description: Calculated number of days remaining until the lease end date.

fields.label: Next Action Date
fields.description: Earliest upcoming date that needs attention, such as notice or break deadline.

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: Currency used for all monetary amounts on this lease.

fields.label: Rent Basis
fields.options:
Monthly
Annual
Per Square Metre
Fixed Term
Other
fields.description: How rent is quoted or calculated for this lease.

fields.label: Monthly Rent
fields.description: Monthly base rent amount, when rent is expressed monthly.

fields.label: Annual Rent
fields.description: Annual base rent amount used for reporting and occupancy cost calculations.

fields.label: Payment Frequency
fields.description: How often rent is invoiced or paid.

fields.label: Security Deposit
fields.description: Refundable deposit or similar amount held at the start of the lease.

fields.label: Annual Service Charge
fields.description: Recurring annual service or maintenance charge included in occupancy cost.

fields.label: Annual Tax
fields.description: Annual tax burden associated with the lease or property.

fields.label: Total Annual Occupancy Cost
fields.description: Calculated annual total of rent, service charge, and tax.

fields.label: Escalation / Indexation Rule
fields.description: Text describing rent review, indexation, or escalation mechanics.

fields.label: Lease Status
fields.options:
Draft
Active
Expiring Soon
Renewal in Progress
Termination in Progress
Renewed
Expired
Terminated
fields.description: Operational status of the lease lifecycle.

fields.label: Renewal Status
fields.options:
Not Started
Draft
Pending Approval
Approved
Rejected
Completed
Not Renewing
fields.description: Current stage of the renewal workflow.

fields.label: Renewal Completed
fields.description: Checked when the most recent renewal cycle has been completed.

fields.label: Last Reminder Date
fields.description: Most recent date a renewal reminder was sent.

fields.label: Next Reminder Date
fields.description: Next scheduled reminder date, if reminders are pending.

fields.label: Last Renewal Request
fields.description: Latest renewal request linked to this lease.

fields.label: Confidentiality Classification
fields.description: Controls how sensitive the lease record is treated internally.

fields.label: Migration Source ID
fields.description: Legacy system identifier used during imports and migrations.

fields.label: Comments
fields.description: Free-form notes, exceptions, or context that do not fit other fields.
